mapper.select: SELECT * FROM t_erp_fin_reconciliation WHERE invoice_id = #{invoiceId} ORDER BY create_time DESC
SELECT * FROM t_erp_fin_reconciliation WHERE invoice_id = #{invoiceId} AND status = 'ACTIVE'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_erp_fin_reconciliation (invoice_id, stock_in_id, reconcile_amount, status, create_by, create_time) VALUES (#{invoiceId}, #{stockInId}, #{reconcileAmount}, #{status}, #{createBy}, #{createTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE t_erp_fin_reconciliation SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
